query:
-- Check total counts and recent entries
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM author_profiles) as total_author_profiles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_profiles) as total_book_profiles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM author_profiles WHERE enrichedAt IS NOT NULL) as enriched_authors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_profiles WHERE enrichedAt IS NOT NULL) as enriched_books,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM author_profiles WHERE avatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND avatarUrl != '') as authors_with_avatar,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_profiles WHERE coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '') as books_with_cover;
command:
